name: Brain Cell Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jell-O according to package directions and chill for 4-5 hours or until firm.
2. Scoop the cottage cheese into a bowl and drain the syrup from the blueberries.
3. Add the berries to the cottage cheese and mix well.
4. Add three drops of food coloring to achieve a grayish color.
5. To serve, place spoonfuls of firm Jell-O onto individual salad plates.
6. Top with the cottage cheese mixture (brain tissue) and serve. Serves 6.
